feat.name: Basic Modification
feat.text: You've learned to modify your innovation in order to enhance its capabilities beyond what an ordinary piece of equipment can accomplish. You gain a basic modification of your choice for your innovation. Your innovation must meet any requirements for the modification you choose, as normal.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
